iran_nuke.notes: Day 16 05:04 — ELEVATED STABLE. No new nuclear-specific signals. Trump rules out deal with Iran. No weapons-grade enrichment or nuclear test. Supreme Leader wounded. 26 (stable).

iran_conventional.notes: Day 16 06:04 — IMMINENT RISING (capped). NEW since last update: (1) Iran-backed militia launches SECOND attack on US Embassy in Baghdad — fire reported at compound (NYT). (2) US orders all citizens to leave Iraq immediately (NYT). (3) Iran declares Hormuz 'open' but bans US/Israeli ships — granting India special passage for LPG tankers. Selective blockade strategy solidifying. (4) Trump pushes allies to form naval escort coalition through Hormuz (Reuters). (5) Trump threatens additional strikes on Kharg Island oil terminal (Reuters). No change to capped probability. 100.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 16 06:04 — IMMINENT MIXED. DE-ESCALATION SIGNALS: (1) Israel-Lebanon direct talks expected (Kushner/Dermer, Paris/Cyprus) (Reuters/Haaretz). (2) UN Sec-Gen Guterres visits Beirut, calls for end to fighting (NYT). France proposes peace agreement with Lebanese recognition of Israel. HOWEVER: (1) Israel rejected Lebanon ceasefire proposal (Aoun). (2) Israeli official says campaign against Hezbollah will 'intensify.' (3) 5 killed in latest strike on Mefdoun (Nabatieh) — including child. (4) 1M displaced. Talks may be pre-escalation negotiation. Score reduces slightly to 89 due to Guterres signal.

turkey.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. No new developments. France keeps carrier in E Med (defensive posture). 65 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 71.

india.notes: ELEVATED STABLE. India releases Ladakh activist Sonam Wangchuk (domestic). MEA condemnation of Pakistan continues. No new military signals. 20 (stable).

russia.notes: Day 16 06:00 — IMMINENT RISING. NEW: (1) Russia hits Ukrainian Railways (Ukrzaliznytsia) facilities — train driver injured (Ukrinform). (2) Ukraine air defense intercepts 460 Russian aerial targets overnight (Ukrinform). (3) 6 killed in latest Russian missile/drone attacks across multiple regions (Reuters). (4) Europe condemns Trump's temporary lifting of Russian oil sanctions — German Chancellor says 'wrong decision' (Guardian). Sanctions waiver directly benefits Russia's war economy. 71 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 77.

china.notes: DETERRENT STABLE. China calls for 'immediate cessation' of Iran hostilities but won't commit warships to Hormuz. Mediating Pak-Afghanistan. 15 (stable).

north_korea.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. NEW: 10+ ballistic missiles fired into sea during US-South Korea drills (Reuters/AJ/Bloomberg). Third provocation this week. Cruise missiles tested from destroyer Choe Hyon (March 4). 47 (stable).

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 16 06:00 — IMMINENT RISING. NEW: (1) Russia hits Ukrzaliznytsia (Ukrainian Railways) facilities — train driver injured (Ukrinform). (2) Ukraine intercepts 460 Russian aerial targets overnight (Ukrinform). (3) 6 killed, 15 wounded in latest attacks across multiple regions (Reuters/Independent). (4) Europe condemns Trump lifting Russian oil sanctions — German Chancellor: 'wrong decision, pressure on Putin should increase' (Guardian). (5) Romania signs joint defence production deal with Ukraine. Continued escalation with no peace talks in sight. 77 + 5 (Iran coupling) = 82.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 16 06:00 — IMMINENT RISING (capped). NEW: (1) Pakistan says it shot down multiple Taliban drones launched from Afghanistan (AP/Tempo). (2) Pakistan foiled infiltration attempt at Chaman sector — killed 1 Taliban soldier (Wikipedia/AP). (3) China and Turkey still attempting ceasefire mediation — no progress. (4) AP: Latest strikes intended to signal 'Afghan territory cannot be used for cross-border attacks.' 99 (capped, +1 from drone shootdown signal).

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch:
DE-ESCALATION SIGNALS: (1) Israel-Lebanon direct talks planned (Kushner/Dermer). (2) UN Sec-Gen Guterres visits Beirut, calls for ceasefire. (3) France proposes peace agreement. HOWEVER: Israel rejected Lebanon ceasefire, campaign will 'intensify.' 1M displaced. Talks may be pre-escalation. Net: de-escalation signals present but outweighed by military operations. Israel-Lebanon remains IMMINENT 89.

NO OTHER DE-ESCALATION. Iran: 100 IMMINENT (capped). Pakistan-Afghanistan: 99 IMMINENT (capped). Russia-Ukraine: 82 IMMINENT. All other fronts holding or rising.

WATCH: (1) Iran's selective Hormuz strategy — dividing international coalition by exempting neutral nations. (2) Second embassy attack in Baghdad — proxy escalation could trigger direct US ground response in Iraq. (3) Israel-Lebanon talks viability — if proceed, may de-escalate; if collapse, expect major ground invasion.

latest_news.headline: Iran-backed militia launches SECOND attack on US Embassy in Baghdad
latest_news.text: Iran-backed militia attacked the US Embassy in Baghdad for the second time. Fire reported at compound. US orders all citizens to leave Iraq immediately. Escalation of proxy attacks on US assets in the region.

latest_news.headline: Iran declares Hormuz 'open' but bans US and Israeli ships — India gets special passage
latest_news.text: Iran says Strait of Hormuz is 'open' but bans US and Israeli-flagged vessels. India's LPG tankers granted special passage. Selective blockade strategy: dividing international community by allowing neutral nations through while targeting US-allied shipping.

latest_news.headline: Trump pushes allies to form naval escort coalition through Hormuz, threatens Kharg Island
latest_news.text: President Trump called on allied nations to help escort oil tankers through the Strait of Hormuz. Separately threatened additional strikes on Kharg Island oil terminal if Iran continues threatening shipping. Iran rebuffed threats, saying waterway under 'full control.'

latest_news.headline: UN Secretary General Guterres visits Beirut, calls for immediate end to fighting
latest_news.text: UN Secretary General António Guterres visited Beirut on Saturday, calling for an immediate end to the fighting in Lebanon. Photojournalists captured Guterres touring struck neighborhoods. Diplomatic pressure increasing alongside direct talks track.

latest_news.headline: Five US refueling tankers destroyed at Saudi Arabia's Prince Salman Air Base
latest_news.text: Five US KC-135 refueling tankers struck and destroyed on the ground at Prince Salman Air Base, Saudi Arabia. Major blow to US aerial logistics in the Gulf theater. Six US airmen identified dead from separate KC-135 crash over Iraq.

latest_news.headline: Israel kills 2 more senior Iranian officials — 400 waves of strikes completed
latest_news.text: Israel says it killed two more senior Iranian officials today, completing 400 waves of airstrikes on targets in western and central Iran since the war began two weeks ago. Systematic degradation of Iranian command structure continues.

latest_news.headline: Israel-Lebanon direct talks expected in coming days (Kushner/Dermer)
latest_news.text: Israel and Lebanon expected to hold direct talks in coming days — first since war began. Kushner and Dermer leading. Possible venues: Paris or Cyprus. France proposes peace agreement including Lebanese recognition of Israel. Israel previously rejected Lebanon's ceasefire proposal.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan shoots down Taliban drones, foils infiltration at Chaman border
latest_news.text: Pakistan says it shot down multiple drones fired by Taliban from Afghanistan. Separately foiled infiltration attempt at Chaman sector, killing 1 Taliban soldier. AP: strikes signal 'Afghan territory cannot be used for cross-border attacks.' China and Turkey ceasefire efforts failing.

outlook:
CRITICAL IMMINENT — Global war probability 85% IMMINENT (Day 16 06:00). MIXED SIGNALS — ESCALATION CONTINUES WITH FIRST DE-ESCALATION SIGNAL:

(1) IRAN → IMMINENT 100 (capped): Five US tankers destroyed at Saudi air base. Israel kills 2 more senior Iranian officials (400 strikes total). IRGC claims hit on USS Lincoln (denied). Dubai explosion. Bahrain intercepts. UAE intercepted 1,567 drones total. India's tankers passed Hormuz — Iran's selective blockade strategy emerging.

(2) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN → IMMINENT 99 (capped): Pakistan shoots down Taliban drones. Foiled Chaman infiltration. China/Turkey mediation failing. Drone war escalating on both sides.

(3) RUSSIA-UKRAINE → IMMINENT 82: Continued bombardment. 6 killed. Ukraine intercepts 460 targets. Russia hits railways. EU condemns Trump's sanctions waiver on Russian oil. No peace talks.

(4) ISRAEL-LEBANON → IMMINENT 92: First de-escalation signal — Israel-Lebanon direct talks planned (Kushner/Dermer). France proposes peace deal. BUT: Israel rejected ceasefire, says campaign will 'intensify.' 5 killed including child in latest strike. 1M displaced. Talks may be pre-escalation negotiation.

(5) TURKEY → IMMINENT 71. DPRK → CRITICAL 47.

SEVEN IMMINENT, ONE CRITICAL, ONE ELEVATED. No new zones auto-created.

WATCH NEXT: (1) Israel-Lebanon talks viability — if they proceed, may de-escalate one front; if they collapse, expect major ground invasion. (2) Hormuz coalition — if US Navy escorts challenged, direct Iran-NATO clash. (3) Iran's selective Hormuz passage — dividing international response. (4) Pakistan's next Kandahar strike — two-front pressure building. (5) Russia's exploitation of ME war — more bombardment expected as attention diverted.
